transcript: Is Danny there?! This is Buck, or Freaky Bucky. Is he around, or…?
Uh, what can I do for ya?
Oh, yeah! I got your number from Mr. Pandolfo down at the Tom Hanks exhibit.
I don’t know who Mr. Pandolfo is but, uh…

Well, you know, why make life difficult for each other? Am I right? [chuckles] [delay] So anyway, there’s this Orb Within an Orb tonight. I was just wondering if you’re gonna maybe check it out, ah, t—tonight—
Huh?! It’s happening only tonight, man.
I’m just kind of a leaf-peeper. You know, I enjoy the forestry, the fall colors. I thought it might be cool.
You thought what might be cool?
No charge! There’s absolutely no chārge!
Are you, uh, a living human being or a bot?
If it’s free, is a dollar bill non-cents?—
Okay! So you can’t—you can’t answer— Ah, just to be clear, you can’t answer that question, right? You can’t—
…tell me whether you’re a living human being or a bot?
I sure can! I guarantee ya I can!
I’m your new neighbor. I’m new in town. I just moved here—
I moved to New York about five days back and I’m new in town.
That’s, ah, delightful, but what does that have to do with me or this phone call? What are you—? Wha—? Again, what can I do for you?
Little Freddie said that you’re a good guy and that I might wanna say hi! ‘Cause I live in the same part of t—
I call him Little Freddie. [chuckles] [delay] Uh, can I just double check, do you have animosity right now, or…?
I’m— I’m a little bit put off by the phone call, I gotta say. I don’t—
…really know where this is going. It’s pretty weird—
‘Cause this shit you’re saying sounds like you’re on LSD; I’ll put it that way.
Hey, last time I went down there to the Pork Chop Surprise, people did somersaults for two hours straight! So I’m tellin’ you it’s a good time. That’s all I’m tryin’ to tell ye! [delay]
What is “The Orb Within an Orb”?
Okay, well, they got the Cavalry of Two-Legged Animals down there. They’re settin’ up next to the Himalayan Quasar Magnet School! [exhales] Yeah! [delay]—
You just invited me to an Orb Within an Orb. I don’t know what that is! I don’t know why I would go.
All the countrymen get free sandwiches—
What else do you have goin’ on?—
What are you doing that’s so special that you can’t go to this thing?
The nothing that I’m doing is preferable to this insane bullshit you’re spouting.
Hey, Danny, just tell me if I need to chill, alright?
Okay! Looks like I’m headed to Gruesome Gulch by myself!
I’ll tell ya what, we’ll get in the bathtub for a little while and then we’ll be good to go. Whadda you say up ‘ere? [pitch-up] [delay]
You piece of shit criminal! You’re still bothering me?
You’ll be arrested, you motherfucker! You’ll be arrested!
Some diabolical genius! He’s just invented the Prank Calling Bot! It’s pretty cool!
This is Freaky Bucky or Bucky Freaky. Bucky Freaky [delay]. Freaky Bucky [delay]. Bucky Freaky [delay]. Freaky Bucky [delay]. Hey, Danny, look after yourself, alright?
“Look after myself”? Ah, so this phone call is winding down?
[excerpt audio from a film[?] unknown to transcriber]
Don’t lie to me! Don’t ever do that! I know how you’re feeling! By now you must be going into barbiturate withdrawal!
